description: Cloudmersive provides cloud APIs for OCR, virus scanning, document conversion, NLP, validation, and related automation/security workloads. It also offers enterprise deployment options, including managed, private-cloud, and MCP-server products.
summary: Cloudmersive exposes public HTTP APIs on https://api.cloudmersive.com, including a documented OCR API and Virus Scan API that both use the same `Apikey` header; Cloudmersive also markets an enterprise MCP server, but its public docs do not publish a client connect endpoint or concrete auth mechanics beyond API-key support.
